description_long: This is a modern, three-story house with a flat roof and large, floor-to-ceiling windows on the front facade. The structure features a clean, rectangular design with a mix of white and gray exterior surfaces, complemented by a green lawn and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. On one side, there is a garage with a flat roof, and the backyard is enclosed by a light-colored fence, containing a tree and a cylindrical water tank. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio area with tiled flooring and additional greenery. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas. The house is situated on a rectangular plot with clear boundaries and landscaping elements.
description: A modern, three-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a landscaped yard with a patio and tree. The design is clean and rectangular, featuring white and gray surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, garage, and green lawn with a paved walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall, garage extension, and fenced backyard with a tree and water tank.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, tiled flooring, tree, water tank, and multiple windows on the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain white wall, backyard fence, and the continuation of the green lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large floor-to-ceiling windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved walkway, no porch or overhang, and minimal decorative elements
